reason: Replace the stale Côte d'Ivoire route shortcut with one reviewed DGI-backed calculator: 18% common VAT, evidence-gated 9% treatment under Ordinance 2026-03, evidence-gated exemption treatment, and turnover bands presented only as regime context. Five engine/API tests and six browser tests cover exact results, evidence refusal, multilingual mobile and dark rendering, privacy, and local PDF export.
